00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000050.subject: Quote request - 4x Julia Pro printers for our Pune lab
00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000050.body: Hi team, we are setting up a rapid prototyping lab in Pune and would like a quotation for four Julia Pro 3D printers with the annual maintenance plan. Could you also share lead times? Regards, Priya Nair, Procurement, Apex Labs.

00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000051.subject: Re: fwd: catching up
00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000051.body: hey - saw this and thought of you. also we should sync on the thing from last week when you get a chance. cheers

00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000060.subject: Re: Julia Pro quotation - PO confirmation
00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000060.body: Rahul, thanks for the revised quote. We are raising the PO for the Apex Labs Pune lab deal this week. Copying our finance head Suresh Menon.

00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000061.subject: Julia Extended - nozzle jam recurring on unit FW-1182
00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000061.body: The Julia Extended in our workshop (serial FW-1182, under AMC) has had three nozzle jams this month. Project: NITK innovation centre rollout. Please schedule a service visit.

00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000020.title: Weekly delivery sync - 2026-06-29
00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000020.transcript: Rahul: The Apex Labs shipment slipped because the extruder batch failed QA. Vijay: OK, re-run QA on the spare batch and update the customer by Thursday. Rahul: I'll own that. Meera: We also need the NITK service visit scheduled before Friday. Vijay: Meera, you coordinate with the field engineer and confirm the slot today.

00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000021.title: Sales standup - 2026-06-30
00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000021.transcript: Anita: The Hyderabad reseller wants updated pricing sheets before their expo. Vijay: Anita, send the July price list by tomorrow. Anita: Will do. Vijay: Also someone needs to draft the follow-up for the quiet BITS Pilani deal. Anita: I'll draft it and share for review by Wednesday.

00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000010.name: NITK innovation centre rollout
blockers: recurring nozzle jams on unit FW-1182

00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000030.name: Apex Labs
00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000030.notes: Setting up Pune prototyping lab; procurement led by Priya Nair.

00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000031.name: NITK
00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000031.notes: Innovation centre rollout under AMC; recurring service issue on FW-1182.

00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001.title: Re-run QA on spare extruder batch

00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000071.title: Send July price list to Hyderabad reseller
